_comment: Live state-detection tuning for bin/claude-mate-wrap. Case-insensitive substrings matched against the rendered claude TUI screen. Hot-reloaded (~0.25s), no restart. Precedence: error > waiting > waiting_footer > busy > idle. 'error'/'waiting'/'busy' match anywhere on screen, so keep them SPECIFIC (generic words there false-trigger on conversation/file content). 'waiting_footer' holds GENERIC picker phrases matched ONLY in the footer (last few non-empty lines).
waiting: tell claude what to do differently
